### Single-cell RNA-seq

- [General workflow](site/workflows/scrna-general.qmd)
- [10x Flex preprocessing](site/workflows/scrna-10x-flex.qmd)
- [Trajectory analysis](site/workflows/scrna-trajectory.qmd)
- [Cell-cell communication](site/workflows/scrna-cellchat.qmd)
- [HPV branch](site/workflows/scrna-hpv.qmd)
- [Seurat to Scanpy](site/workflows/scrna-seurat-scanpy.qmd)
- [Stomach branch](site/workflows/scrna-stomach.qmd)
- [ShinyCell portal](site/workflows/scrna-shinycell.qmd)
- [Large dataset analysis](site/workflows/scrna-large.qmd)
- [Module enrichment](site/workflows/scrna-module.qmd)
- [iPSC branch](site/workflows/scrna-ipsc.qmd)
- [Immune branch](site/workflows/scrna-immune.qmd)
- [inferCNV](site/workflows/scrna-infercnv.qmd)
- [Label transfer](site/workflows/scrna-label-transfer.qmd)

### Single-cell ATAC-seq

- [General workflow](site/workflows/scatac-general.qmd)
- [ArchR branch](site/workflows/scatac-archr.qmd)
- [Cicero branch](site/workflows/scatac-cicero.qmd)
- [cisTopic branch](site/workflows/scatac-cistopic.qmd)
- [ChromVAR motif activity](site/workflows/scatac-chromvar.qmd)
- [Gene activity score](site/workflows/scatac-gene-activity.qmd)

### Single-cell Multi-omics

- [AD branch](site/workflows/multiome-ad.qmd)

### Single-cell TCR-seq

- [TCR-seq analysis](site/workflows/tcr-analysis.qmd)

### Spatial Transcriptomics

- [General workflow](site/workflows/spatial-general.qmd)
- [BayesSpace branch](site/workflows/spatial-bayesspace.qmd)
- [Giotto branch](site/workflows/spatial-giotto.qmd)
- [Spotlight branch](site/workflows/spatial-spotlight.qmd)
- [Cellular neighborhood](site/workflows/spatial-neighborhood.qmd)

### Bulk RNA-seq / ATAC-seq / ChIP-seq

- [RNA-seq workflow pilot](rnaseq-workflow.qmd)
- [RNA-seq nf-core workflow](site/workflows/bulk-rnaseq-nfcore.qmd)
- [ATAC-seq nf-core workflow](site/workflows/bulk-atac-nfcore.qmd)
- [Bulk ATAC workflow](site/workflows/bulk-atac-general.qmd)
- [ChIP-seq workflow](site/workflows/bulk-chipseq.qmd)
- [ChIP-seq workflow v2](site/workflows/bulk-chipseq-v2.qmd)
- [HOMER motif analysis](site/workflows/bulk-homer.qmd)

### Bisulfite sequencing

- [Bismark aligner](site/workflows/bsseq-bismark.qmd)

### Whole Genome Sequencing

- [Low-pass karyotyping](site/workflows/wgs-karyotyping.qmd)

### Gene Regulatory Networks

- [CellOracle workflow](site/workflows/grn-celloracle.qmd)

### Enrichment / downstream analysis

- [Pathway enrichment](site/workflows/enrichment-pathway.qmd)

### Data utilities

- [GEO download](site/workflows/data-geo-download.qmd)
- [GEO submission](site/workflows/data-geo-submission.qmd)
- [H5AD conversion](site/workflows/data-h5ad.qmd)
- [SRA download](site/workflows/data-sra.qmd)
